main.description: Notify the appserver that the caller has read messages in a room up to the given message. If seenUpTo is omitted, marks all current messages as seen. Requires read access to the room.

roomId.description: The room to mark as seen.

seenUpTo.description: Message entity ID to use as the high-water mark. Only messages at or before this entity are marked seen. Omit to mark all current messages as seen.
